# SkillTreeNode.SkillSno property

The Power SNO of the skill this node is (for an Unlock) or modifies (for a Modifier). This is also the node's prerequisite — a modifier needs its skill. 0 when the node references no skill. Resolve effect text via [`ReadPower`](../Diablo4Storage/ReadPower.md).

```csharp
public int SkillSno { get; }
```
